Insight: Small but extremely valuable group that drives most future revenue.
Recommendation: Protect with loyalty rewards, VIP campaigns, early access, and personalized recommendations.

Insight: Largest stable customer group with moderate revenue potential.
Recommendation: Grow using cross-sell offers, bundles, category recommendations, and moderate-value campaigns.

Insight: Previously active customers whose long recency makes them risky.
Recommendation: Reactivate using win-back discounts, reminder campaigns, and limited-time offers.

Insight: Low-frequency customers with limited history and high zero-spend risk.
Recommendation: Nurture using onboarding flows, first-repeat-purchase offers, and low-cost engagement campaigns.
